description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a casual urban appearance, featuring a slightly animated facial expression and short, swept-back hair. He is dressed in a fitted long-sleeve shirt and slim jeans, both of which are form-fitting and modern in style. The figure's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and his hands are open with fingers slightly spread. He wears sturdy lace-up boots, adding to the practical, everyday look suitable for city environments. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle anatomical details. The surface finish is matte, with smooth transitions between clothing and skin, and the asset is visually cohesive and well-modeled.
description: A stylized adult male in casual attire, standing with arms outstretched and wearing boots, jeans, and a long-sleeve shirt. The figure has short, swept-back hair and a modern, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, chest, and outstretched arms, with full visibility of the shirt and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the contour of the body, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, jeans, and boots, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile from the opposite side, mirroring the left with similar body and clothing contours.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and slim jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
